# Step 1 — PR List (Purchaser View)

> The main landing screen for the Purchase Officer. Lists all PRs the purchaser can see, filtered to show actionable items by default ("My Pending"). Unlike the Creator view, the purchaser sees PRs across all departments.

![PR List — My Pending](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 1.1 Access Path

```
Dashboard → Procurement (left sidebar) → Purchase Request
```

Direct URL: `/procurement/purchase-request`

**Permissions required:** Role includes `Purchasing Staff`, `Purchaser`, `Procurement Manager`, or `Purchasing Agent`.

---

## 1.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    list["1. PR List"] --> detail["2. PR Detail"]
    detail --> edit["3. Edit Mode - Vendor and Pricing"]
    edit --> actions["4. Workflow Actions - Approve / Reject / Send for Review"]
    actions --> done(["PR Advanced or Returned"])
    style list fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 1.3 Page Layout

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  HEADER: ← Procurement / Purchase Request   [Export][Print][Add Request] │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Search box │ [My pending] [All Documents] │ [All Stage ▼] [Filter]       │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  TABLE: checkbox │ PR No. │ Date │ Type │ Stage │ Status │ ... │
│  ...rows...                                                      │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  PAGINATION: Showing 1–10 of N │ Rows per page [10 ▼] │ ← 1 2 3 → │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 1.4 Primary Filter Toggle

| Toggle | Behaviour | Default |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| **My pending** | Shows PRs requiring this purchaser's action (statuses: Draft, Submitted, In Progress, Returned) | ✅ Default |
| **All Documents** | Shows all PRs accessible to this user regardless of status | — |

> The purchaser's "My Pending" shows PRs at the **Purchase** workflow stage (not the Creator's Draft PRs).

---

## 1.5 Secondary Filters

| Filter | Available When | Options |
|--------|---------------|---------|
| **All Stage** dropdown | Always | All Stage, Request Creation, Department Approval, Purchasing Review, Finance Review, Final Approval, Completed |
| **Status** dropdown | All Documents selected | All Status, Draft, Submitted, In Progress, Approved, Rejected, Cancelled |
| **Filter** panel | Always | Date Range, Department, Requestor, Amount Range, Currency, PR Type |

![Stage Dropdown](data:image/png;base64,)
![Filter Panel](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 1.6 List Columns

| Column | Description | Notes |
|--------|-------------|-------|
| # (checkbox) | Row select for bulk action | — |
| **PR No.** | Auto-generated reference, e.g. `PR20260400060` | **Clickable button** → opens PR Detail |
| **Date** | PR creation date | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **Type** | General / Asset / Market List | Set by Creator at creation |
| **Stage** | Current workflow stage | e.g. HOD, Purchase, FC |
| **Status** | Status badge | IN PROGRESS (yellow), COMPLETED (green), VOID (red), DRAFT (grey) |
| **Requestor** | Name of user who created the PR | May show Thai name |
| **Department** | Creator's department | e.g. Guest Service and Bell Staff |
| **Total Amount** | Sum of all item amounts | 2 decimal places |
| **Currency** | Transaction currency | e.g. THB |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** BRD (FR-PR-009) lists an `Actions` column with row-level buttons. The live UI does not show a row action column — access to detail is via clicking the PR No. button only.

---

## 1.7 Top-Right Controls

| Button | Color | Always Available | Purpose / Use Case | Behaviour |
|--------|-------|-----------------|-------------------|-----------|
| **Export** | Outline / Secondary | ✅ Yes | Download the current filtered list to Excel/CSV — use for reporting or offline review | Exports all rows matching active filter; no row selection required |
| **Print** | Outline / Secondary | ✅ Yes | Print the current list view — use when a physical copy of the PR queue is needed | Opens browser print dialog |
| **Add Request** | Blue / Primary | ✅ Yes | Create a new PR directly from the list — Purchasing Staff can initiate PRs on behalf of a department | Opens PR creation flow (same as Creator flow) |

---

## 1.8 Status Badge Colours

| Status | Colour | Description |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| IN PROGRESS | Yellow | At least one approval stage complete, more pending |
| COMPLETED | Green | Converted to Purchase Order |
| DRAFT | Grey | Not yet submitted |
| VOID | Red | Rejected by an approver |
| CANCELLED | Grey | Manually cancelled |
| CHECK REVISED | Orange | Returned for revision |

---

## 1.9 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Source |
|---|------|--------|
| BR-01 | My Pending shows only PRs at stages requiring this user's action | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-02 | All Documents shows all PRs the purchaser has permission to view (all departments) | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-03 | Purchaser sees PRs from all departments (no department-level filter by default) | FR-PR-011A |
| BR-04 | Stage filter narrows list to a specific workflow stage | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-05 | List default sort: Date descending | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-06 | Real-time updates — no manual refresh required | FR-PR-009 |

---

## 1.10 Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| Purchaser has no PRs at Purchase stage | My Pending shows empty state with "No purchase requests found" |
| PR is at Purchase stage but locked by another user in edit | Row still appears; "Locked" indicator may show (TBC) |
| All Documents count differs from My Pending | Expected — All Documents shows 81 PRs; My Pending shows 26 (subset awaiting action) |
| User clicks Export with no rows selected | Exports all rows matching current filter |
| Network error during list load | Spinner persists; no error state observed in UI (TBC) |
| PR No. link clicked on a PR at HOD stage (not yet at Purchase) | Opens PR Detail in read-only; no Edit or Approve button visible |
| Purchaser uses Stage filter to find PRs returned from FC | Filters to correct subset; pagination resets to page 1 |

---

## 1.11 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|------------|
| Click PR No. | → step-02 PR Detail |
| Click Add Request | → Creator PR creation flow (BL-PAGE-002) |
| Select My Pending toggle | Refreshes list to pending-only view |
| Select All Documents toggle | Refreshes list to full view |
| Change Stage dropdown | Filters rows; remains on same page |
| Click row checkbox | Selects row (bulk action — TBC if purchaser has bulk actions) |

---

## 1.12 API Endpoints

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `/procurement/purchase-request` | GET | Fetch PR list with filters |
| `/procurement/purchase-request?stage=purchase` | GET | Filter to Purchase stage |
| TBD | GET | Export to Excel/CSV |
